completion_data.completion_summary: Archived BFMCS Completeness and FMP Completeness theorems (5 files) to Boneyard/Metalogic_v8 because they use non-standard validity definitions. Relocated 3 shared utilities to Construction.lean. Full build passes with no regressions.
